grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions EDD in section 6 and discusses when it's appropriate for overseas funds

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: Section 1 specifically covers country risk assessment including FATF high-risk jurisdictions

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Section 2 explicitly requires SWIFT message/wire confirmation with detailed requirements
Section 3 specifically covers currency conversion evidence including exchange rates and FX documentation

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: Section 10 explicitly mentions SAR reporting to NCA and DAML procedures
